allow: PowerShell($shortcut = "C:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows\\Start Menu\\Programs\\Anaconda\\Anaconda Prompt \(anaconda\).lnk"; if \(Test-Path $shortcut\) { $sh = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell; $lnk = $sh.CreateShortcut\($shortcut\); Write-Output "Target: $\($lnk.TargetPath\)"; Write-Output "Args: $\($lnk.Arguments\)"; Write-Output "WorkDir: $\($lnk.WorkingDirectory\)" } else { Get-ChildItem "C:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows\\Start Menu\\Programs\\Anaconda" | Select-Object Name })
